Interface DatabaseInterface

All Known Implementing Classes:
DatabaseMethods
public interface DatabaseInterface
Interface for other teams to have indirect access to the Operations team database
Version:
2.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addFilmBooking(Connection conn, String eventName, LocalDateTime startDateTime, LocalDateTime endDateTime, BigDecimal ticketPrice, double maxDiscount, String venueName)
    Adds a film booking hosted by Lancaster's Music Hall to the calendar and database
    List<Booking>
    getBookings(Connection conn, LocalDate timeframeStart, LocalDate timeframeEnd)
    Returns a list of Booking objects.
    boolean
    isVenueAvailable(Connection conn, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, String venueName)
    Returns true if a venue can be used between the given time frame

  • Method Details

    • getBookings

      List<Booking> getBookings(Connection conn, LocalDate timeframeStart, LocalDate timeframeEnd) throws Exception
      Returns a list of Booking objects. Bookings contain multiple events accessible via .getEvents() Events contain a SeatingConfig accessible via .getSeatingConfig The restricted views within the SeatingConfig via
      Parameters:
      conn - Connection variable for the database
      timeframeStart - LocalDate determining the start of the time frame from which to fetch bookings
      timeframeEnd - LocalDate determining the end of the time frame from which to fetch bookings
      Returns:
      List containing bookings
      Throws:
      Exception

    • addFilmBooking

      boolean addFilmBooking(Connection conn, String eventName, LocalDateTime startDateTime, LocalDateTime endDateTime, BigDecimal ticketPrice, double maxDiscount, String venueName) throws Exception
      Adds a film booking hosted by Lancaster's Music Hall to the calendar and database
      Parameters:
      conn - Connection variable for the database
      eventName - Name of the event
      startDateTime - LocalDateTime determining when the event is
      endDateTime - LocalDateTime determining when the event ends
      ticketPrice - Price of the tickets as a BigDecimal
      maxDiscount - Maximum discount that can be applied to ticket prices
      venueName - Name of the venue, must be "Main Hall" or "Small Hall"
      Returns:
      true if booking was successful
      Throws:
      Exception

    • isVenueAvailable

      boolean isVenueAvailable(Connection conn, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, String venueName) throws Exception
      Returns true if a venue can be used between the given time frame
      Parameters:
      conn - Connection variable for the database
      start - LocalDateTime determining the start of the timeframe to search between
      end - LocalDateTime determining the end of the timeframe to search between
      venueName - Name of the venue
      Returns:
      true if the venue is available
      Throws:
      Exception
